anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Operating table centroid extracted from architect Rev-E theatre layout dated 2026-05-22; central position with surgical luminaire pendant; bed top at 1000mm AFF per equipment schedule.

zones._derivation_note: Group 2 patient envelope per §710: 1.5m radius cylinder around the patient position, 12-sided regular polygon approximation centred at (3000,2500). Height_min=0, height_max=2500mm covers the surgical working volume. RCD-protection NOT applied inside the envelope — Group 2 mandates a medical IT (insulated) system instead per §710. Sockets and switches in the envelope MUST be medical-isolating-socket type connected to the IT system.

electrical_constraints._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §710 + BS EN 61557-8 (IMD 8 s alarm response) + HTM 06-01 (NHS precedence)
electrical_constraints._derivation_note: Medical IT system required for the Group 2 patient envelope per §710 (no Part 7 sub-clauses valid; §710 top-level only). IMD per BS EN 61557-8 with 8 s alarm response. Isolating transformer at 5 kVA — within the 3.15-8 kVA plausibility band per D-4 (no flag raised). Supplementary bonding ≤0.2 Ω per §710. HTM 06-01 NHS technical memorandum takes precedence in NHS sites and defines safety_service_category 1 (no-break).

Supplementary equipotential bonding within the Group 2 patient environment per §710 + §701.415.2. Resistance ≤0.2 Ω (measured 0.15 Ω per input override). Bonding extends to operating table frame, anaesthesia machine ground, scrub sink, and any other metallic touchable surface in the envelope.

assumptions: Cascade source: standalone C.1 example uk-medical-or-group-2-with-it-system. Synthetic upstream db-layout intent models a Medical IT panel (5kVA isolating transformer) as a board node + ME terminal with supplementary bonding ≤0.15Ω.
Demonstrates db-layout INV-16 sub-check 4 (medical IT distribution) PASS — all medical_isolating_socket circuits and surgical_luminaire circuits routed via the medical_it_panel.
Group 2 patient envelope approximated as 12-sided regular polygon (1.5m radius cylinder) per the geometry-validation convention recorded in spec §5.7.
Isolating transformer sized at 5 kVA per input medical_it_system_override; within the 3.15-8 kVA plausibility band so no D-4 flag is raised.
Safety service category 1 (no-break) sourced from HTM 06-01 NHS technical memorandum, NOT from BS 7671 §710 (no such sub-clause exists in the verified file).

invariants.evidence: 1 anchor (patient_1) produces 1 zone (medical_envelope_group_2). No overlaps with sibling zones (single zone).

existing_fixtures_audit[] has 2 representative entries (consumed from upstream db-layout intent: 1 medical_isolating_socket + 1 surgical_luminaire). Both compliance_status=compliant. non_compliance_flags[] empty. One-to-one correspondence vacuously holds.

medical_envelope_group_2 zone present; sibling medical_it_system constraint present with applies_to_zone_ids=[zone_patient_1_envelope_g2] AND imd_alarm_response_time_s_max=8 AND supplementary_bonding_max_resistance_ohm=0.2 per BS 7671:2018 §710 + BS EN 61557-8. Also satisfies the schema-level allOf if/then enforcing this combination.
room_type=medical_group_2_theatre, not bathroom/shower_room/sauna. §701.411.3.3 + §703.411.3.3 RCD blanket N/A — INV-04 vacuously passes per spec §7.2.
Not a pool hall. §702.415.1 main bonding N/A.

2 representative fixtures consumed from upstream db-layout intent + audited against §710 envelope. Sub-rule (a) type_prohibited: medical_isolating_socket + surgical_luminaire both permitted by §710 when on medical IT supply. Sub-rule (b) ip_below_min: IPx4 (socket) + IPx2 (surgical lum) per §710 OR conventions. Sub-rule (c) switch_distance_too_close: N/A. Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max: 230V ≤ 230V. 8 sub-rule evaluations PASS. Both sit outside the envelope in plan/vertical (med_socket_1 at corner outside cylinder; surgical_lum_1 at z=3000mm above height_max 2500mm).
compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no silent overlaps. Self-consistency holds.

rationale.chat_summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 example #6 (uk-medical-or-group-2-with-it-system) for the db-layout consumer. Synthetic upstream db-layout intent models a Medical IT panel (5kVA) + ME terminal with supplementary bonding per §710 + BS EN 61557-8. Demonstrates db-layout INV-16 sub-check 4 (medical IT distribution) PASS.

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 standalone uk-medical-or-group-2-with-it-system for the db-layout consumer. Upstream db-layout intent (synthetic at electrical/db-layout/examples/uk-medical-or-cascade-source/intent-out.json) models a Medical IT panel as a board node — 5kVA isolating transformer per §710, IMD with 8s alarm per BS EN 61557-8, ME terminal with supplementary bonding ≤0.15Ω per IEC 60364-7-710. All medical_isolating_socket and surgical_luminaire circuits routed via this panel (NOT general LV).

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §710 Group 2 medical locations: medical IT system per §710 + BS EN 61557-8 (8s IMD alarm response); 5kVA isolating transformer plausibility band 3.15-8kVA. IEC 60364-7-710 supplementary equipotential bonding ≤0.2Ω. HTM 06-01 (NHS) precedence.

sections.title: Consumer-side hand-off — db-layout INV-16 sub-check 4 (the cascade core)
sections.summary: db-layout v1.5 INV-16 sub-check 4 iterates over the db-layout output IR and verifies: (1) a medical_it_panel board node exists, with isolating_transformer_va inside §710 plausibility band; (2) the IT panel has an associated IMD with alarm_response_time_s ≤ 8 (per BS EN 61557-8); (3) every circuit serving a Group 2 envelope fixture routes via this medical_it_panel (no circuits from general LV distribution); (4) a ME terminal modelled with supplementary_bonding_resistance_ohm ≤ 0.20. For this cascade: all 4 sub-checks PASS. The C.1 source's 5kVA + 8s alarm + ≤0.15Ω numbers carry through.

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Synthetic upstream db-layout intent. The 5kVA transformer sits inside §710 3.15-8kVA plausibility band (no D-4); IMD alarm at 8s = spec limit (no D-3); supplementary bonding ≤0.15Ω well within 0.2Ω limit (no D-3). All carried forward unchanged from C.1 source. HTM 06-01 NHS precedence noted in C.1 honest disclosures.
